recommendations.title: The Hater
recommendations.overview: A duplicitous young man finds success in the dark world of social media smear tactics — but his virtual vitriol soon has violent real-life consequences.

recommendations.title: Suicide Room

recommendations.title: Anniversary
recommendations.overview: When Ellen and Paul’s son Josh introduces his new girlfriend at their 25th anniversary party, no one suspects that it is the beginning of the end for this happy family. The new girlfriend is Liz, Ellen’s former student, who left the university, some

recommendations.title: Warsaw 44
recommendations.overview: City of Warsaw, Poland, August 1st, 1944. Citizens have experienced inhuman acts of terror and violence during five long years of Nazi occupation. As the Soviet Army relentlessly approaches, the youngest and bravest among them rise up as one and face

recommendations.title: Me Before You
recommendations.overview: Lou Clark, a directionless 26-year-old from the English countryside, takes a job at the local castle as a caregiver and companion to a wealthy young banker, Will Traynor. Wheelchair-bound from an accident two years prior, the once adventurous Will ha

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Vermiglio
recommendations.overview: In the last days of the Second World War, a deserting soldier disrupts a tranquil and isolated mountain community. For one family, his arrival brings excitement and romance, but tragedy lies in wait.

recommendations.title: Wake Up Dead Man: A Knives Out Mystery

recommendations.title: Jimmy's Hall
recommendations.overview: Jimmy Gralton returns from New York and reopens his beloved community hall, only to meet opposition from the local parish.

recommendations.title: Appaloosa
recommendations.overview: Two friends hired to police a small town that is suffering under the rule of a rancher find their job complicated by the arrival of a young widow.
